description.ko: 폭우와 선명한 홀로그램이 액체 네온 반사를 만들어내는 우울한 테크-누아르 도시 경관.
description.en: A melancholic tech-noir cityscape where heavy rain and vibrant holograms create a liquid neon reflection.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Indigo Monsoon Reservoir.' Towering #1A0033 indigo megastructures are reflected in a flooded urban plaza. Massive 3D holographic lotuses bloom in pulsing #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan light through a heavy downpour. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through a dense, smoky volumetric atmosphere. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, and lens flares from flickering neon signs. 8k resolution, capturing the romantic and melancholic soul of a futuristic megacity.
